stainProtocols.name: Emory University H&E
stainProtocols.description: Derived from Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen DAB (Brown). Standard histology.

stainProtocols.name: Emory University amyloid beta (4G8)
stainProtocols.description: Derived from Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen DAB (Brown). Survey: 4G8

stainProtocols.name: Emory University tau (PHF1)
stainProtocols.description: Derived from Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen DAB (Brown). Survey: PHF1

stainProtocols.name: Emory University alpha-synuclein (unknown)
stainProtocols.description: Derived from Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen DAB (Brown). Survey: Phospho-specific WAKO 015-25191, clone Syn #64

stainProtocols.name: Emory University TDP-43 (unknown)
stainProtocols.description: Derived from Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen DAB (Brown). Survey: Phospho-specific Cosmo Bio  TIP-PTD-P02

stainProtocols.name: Emory University silver (Bielschowsky)
stainProtocols.description: Derived from Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). hematoxylin counterstain; chromogen DAB (Brown). Survey label: Silver stain; mapped to Bielschowsky in Pitt schema.

regionProtocols.name: Emory University — Posterior hippocampus
regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein, TDP-43, Silver. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein, Silver. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein, TDP-43, Silver. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Emory University — Visual cortex (occipital)
regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, Silver. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated). Survey landmarks: Line of Gennari (BA17), BA18.

regionProtocols.name: Emory University — Striatum (basal ganglia)
regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, α-Synuclein. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated). Survey landmarks: Anterior Commissure, Nucleus Basalis of Meynert, Globus Pallidus, Caudate, Internal Capsule, Putamen.

regionProtocols.name: Emory University — Thalamus
regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Tau Stain. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Emory University — Cerebellum
regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, Aβ Stain, Tau Stain, P62. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

regionProtocols.name: Emory University — Central gyri (motor cortex)
regionProtocols.description: From Emory University ADRC Neuropath Survey (Aug 17, 2022). Survey stains: H&E, depends on the case. Sampling per survey (typically after coronal slicing when indicated).

notes: P62 / CD68 / other survey stains may not have Pitt schema stain types — see region descriptions.
Antibody fields that only say phospho/non-phospho are resolved from vendor/clone columns.
Regions marked Not Collected in the survey are omitted.
